scripts.build: turbo run build && npm run build:web
scripts.build:web: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r index.html privacy-policy.html src dist/
scripts.dev:desktop:windows: npm run build:web && cd apps/desktop && npx tauri dev
scripts.dev:desktop:linux: npm run build:web && cd apps/desktop && npx tauri dev
scripts.dev:desktop:macos: npm run build:web && cd apps/desktop && npx tauri dev
scripts.dev:mobile:android: npm run build:web && cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android
scripts.dev:mobile:ios: npm run build:web && cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.deploy:mobile:sync: npm run build:web && cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.deploy:mobile:android: npm run deploy:mobile:sync && cd apps/mobile && npx cap open android
scripts.deploy:mobile:ios: npm run deploy:mobile:sync && cd apps/mobile && npx cap open ios
